## 2026-03-18

### Impact

- Fixed a crash (`IllegalArgumentException`) that could occur during authentication on certain websites that return complex nested data structures in their responses.
- Fixed an issue where users could be incorrectly marked as authenticated when a JavaScript error occurred during login verification, which would cause a task to start prematurely.

### Changes

- Bumped Muppet to 0.0.0-alpha42 and Muppet Legacy to 0.0.0-alpha5, which includes:
  - Fixed JSON parsing crash when HTTP responses contain nested non-primitive values in JSON arrays
  - Fixed JavaScript evaluate errors returning truthy strings instead of null, causing false positives in authentication checks

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

#### Latest

| Name       | Compatible | Build Version |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------- |
| Kotlin     | 2.0+       | 2.1.21        |
| Gradle     | 8.7+       | 8.7           |
| AGP        | 8.6+       | 8.6.1         |
| Min SDK    | 21         | 21            |
| Target SDK | 35         | 35            |

#### Legacy (`-kotlin1.9`)

| Name       | Compatible | Build Version |
| ---------- | ---------- | ------------- |
| Kotlin     | 1.9.x      | 1.9.25        |
| Gradle     | 8.0+       | 8.7           |
| AGP        | 8.1 - 8.5  | 8.1.4         |
| Min SDK    | 21         | 21            |
| Target SDK | 35         | 35            |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/atomicfi/atomic-transact-android/compare/v3.17.0...v3.17.1
